questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'Melt and Pour' rule introduced in the DMI&SP Policy 2025?

questions.option_2: Biometric authentication is required at smelting plants for traceability
questions.option_3: Steel used in government-funded projects is completely manufactured in India
questions.option_4: Steel exports must include documentation of Indian melting processes
